subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, thy letter was perused, and I offered supplications at the threshold of the one True Lord, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه ات ملاحظه گردید در حق تو انابه باستان خداوند یگانه نمودم تا
subcodes.subjects: @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
